description: Phase 3 re-test: C_rand v2 (blacklisted known pairs) + N=50 per method
rationale: Phase 2 NO-GO was caused by C_rand v1 baseline bias: KG-path traversal included trivially-known pairs (HER2→breast_cancer etc.) giving C_rand precision=1.000. C2's 0.833 reflects genuine novelty. C_rand v2 uses truly random sampling with known-pair blacklist.
changes_from_v1: C_rand redesigned: random pair sampling (no KG traversal)
Known-pair blacklist: KG 1-hop edges + trivially-known pairs
New endpoints: SC-1r through SC-4r (novel_supported_rate focus)

C_rand_v2.description: Truly random cross-domain pairs; excludes KG 1-hop edges and trivially-known pairs
